headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Mid-America Apartment, Lowers Price Target to $126
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains Mid-America Apartment (NYSE:MAA) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $141 to $126.
